title: Salvador, BA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Salvador is a city in BA with a population of 2,886,698. Brazil’s first capital and Afro-Brazilian cultural heart, famous for Pelourinho, capoeira, samba, and stunning coastal views.
